closure_decision.closeout_statement: M24 is ready for operator handoff as an authenticated internal lexical product candidate. Final product closure is not self-certified until Daniel acceptance and a separate independent-operator exercise pass.

evidence_hygiene: no production semantic or hybrid authority asserted

programme.closure_note: All fifteen Source PR #19 decisions are accounted for; the final four remain narrowed as harness-specific before canonical use.
programme.handoff_goal: Canonical Source adoption decision capture and adoption planning.

programme.closure_note: Candidate release artifacts rebuild and cross-validate by digest.
Wiki, lexical search, source viewer, graph, answer, and export payloads share the release identity.
programme.handoff_goal: Product surfaces integrated against the same canonical release.

programme.closure_note: Three consecutive candidate-only batches and dry-run drills pass; large-scale ingestion remains separately gated.
programme.handoff_goal: Controlled ingestion pilot with bounded batches and drills.

programme.closure_note: Internal lexical evidence bundles and citation verification pass; production answer serving is not authorized.
The internal product package is deployed behind Cloudflare Access and unauthenticated probes do not expose release content.
Production remains lexical; semantic, hybrid, and answer serving promotion require explicit later approval.
programme.remaining_trigger: Approve a production promotion request after semantic promotion acceptance passes.

programme.closure_note: The controlled pilot passed, but the large-scale ingestion gate remains intentionally blocked until capacity and scale-tier acceptance are approved.
programme.remaining_trigger: Approve the next scale tier after review throughput, backpressure, and production promotion prerequisites are satisfied.

programme.closure_note: Feedback and maintenance lifecycle is codified for operator handoff; production-impacting maintenance remains gated.
The handoff-only replay bundle is ready, but this session cannot self-certify the required independent-operator exercise.
programme.handoff_goal: Final product closure by independent operator exercise.
programme.remaining_trigger: A different qualified operator completes the full unseen-source exercise from the handoff alone.

remaining_items.reason: Codex observed the Access wall but cannot complete Daniel's browser login and acceptance on his behalf.
remaining_items.trigger_to_complete: Daniel signs in through Cloudflare Access and accepts the rendered canonical release.

remaining_items.reason: The P10 handoff definition requires an operator who did not build the original path.
remaining_items.trigger_to_complete: A separate qualified operator ingests an unseen source and reproduces the evidence from the handoff alone.

remaining_items.reason: Semantic promotion has not been accepted for production and production retrieval must remain lexical.
remaining_items.trigger_to_complete: Merge an explicit semantic promotion decision and production promotion request with rollback evidence.

remaining_items.reason: Internal citation verification exists, but production answer serving needs separate groundedness, ACL, latency, cost, and off-switch acceptance.
remaining_items.trigger_to_complete: Approve production answer serving after the semantic promotion gate and answer-serving acceptance pass.

remaining_items.reason: The controlled pilot passed, but scale-tier authority is intentionally blocked until capacity, backpressure, and production promotion prerequisites are satisfied.
remaining_items.trigger_to_complete: Approve the first progressive scale tier with measured review capacity and rollback/deletion drill evidence.
